title: Reachability Analysis — Enterprise Feature Monitoring & Production Hardening
description: tests/risk/reachability/ has enterprise_features and monitoring tests alongside test_reachability_unit.py and test_cyber_resilience_engine.py. The reachability analyzer computes confirmed/potential/not-reachable classifications. Gap: enterprise features (multi-tenant reachability, CI gate blocking, SLA integration) are tested but the monitoring instrumentation (metrics, health checks) is not wired to the API.
missing: Reachability health endpoint: /api/v1/reachability/health that reports last_scan_time, queue_depth, and avg_analysis_duration for monitoring
Multi-tenant reachability isolation: enforce org_id scoping in all reachability DB queries to prevent cross-tenant call graph leakage
Cyber resilience → reachability scoring: when cyber_resilience_engine runs an exercise, use reachability data to compute which assets are reachable from the simulated attack entry point
